cards.front: Root Guard disables a port if [...].

Enable Root Guard on a port:
SW1(config-if)# [...]
If a Root Guard-enabled port receives a superior BPDU, it will enter the [...] state.
In the output of show spanning-tree, what does BKN mean?
In the output of show spanning-tree, what does ROOT_Inc mean?
A port disabled by Root Guard will be re-enabled when [...].
